title: Replicate Prediction
description: A prediction represents a single inference run against a machine learning model on Replicate.

id.description: The unique identifier for the prediction.

version.description: The ID of the model version used for this prediction.

model.description: The model owner/name used for official model predictions.

get.description: URL to poll for prediction status.

stream.description: URL for streaming output via SSE.

status.description: The current status of the prediction.

input.description: The input provided to the model as a JSON object.

output.description: The output of the prediction. Type depends on the model.

error.description: Error message if the prediction failed.

predict_time.description: Time taken for the prediction in seconds.

total_time.description: Total wall clock time in seconds.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the prediction was created.

started_at.description: Timestamp when the prediction started processing.

webhook.description: Webhook URL to receive prediction updates.

webhook_events_filter.description: Event types that trigger webhook calls.
